name: Graphify Investigation Synthesis Document
goal: Produce docs/graphify-investigation.md synthesizing the completed Graphify evaluation into a single document answering five required questions.

tasks.name: Write docs/graphify-investigation.md
tasks.description: Read the three existing Graphify evaluation source documents and synthesize them into docs/graphify-investigation.md, structured around five required questions, then self-check for accuracy and stage the file.

steps.description: Write docs/graphify-investigation.md with sections: Background, then the five required questions (Graphify vs. wiki/episodic coverage; complementary vs. redundant; concrete worker/Brain value; integration complexity; go/no-go recommendation), plus a brief relationship-to-d1266 note. Content must be drawn only from the three source documents.
Re-read the new doc against the three sources; confirm no contradictions, recommendation matches source recommendation exactly, and all five questions have substantive (non-placeholder) content.
Stage the file (docs/ is gitignored in this repo; force-add is the established convention for plan/doc artifacts).
